name: Nanjing Chixia Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanjing Chixia Development Co., Ltd. engages in the development of real estate properties in China. It is also involved in the development and construction of residential and office buildings, public buildings, and commercial housing projects; sale of commercial houses; leasing activities; planning, design, and construction of garden landscapes; and construction management activities. The company also offers after-sales services. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Nanjing, China.
